form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (19.51) over 340m at this track. Drops down the inside box this time. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Cheryl Blue at Maitland last start over 400m (22.41). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Cheryl Blue at Maitland last start over 400m (22.41). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Richmond over 401m in 23.42. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 320m at Richmond at Mix 1/2/3 level. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at Richmond over 401m in 23.42. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 320m at Richmond at Mix 1/2/3 level. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Maitland when a 2.25 lengths third but did clock a slick 22.42 over the 400m trip. Harder here and looks a place chance only.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.84) in a Grade 3/4, finishing a 10 length fifth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 340m at this track. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 340m at this track. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Richmond to win by 5.5 lengths in 22.88, beating Our Frankie Girl. Last start finished 4th on April 1 over 401m at Richmond behind Supreme Lady beaten 8 lengths (23.33) in a Grade 4/5. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring over 520m at Wentworth Park. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumes from a three-and-a-half months spell and was a fresh up winner last time in, scoring over 520m at Wentworth Park. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 340m at this track beaten 21 lengths (20.80) behind Zipping Ali in a Grade 5 on March 31. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the first turn hampered, crowded for room and came together.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on March 2 over 365m at Nowra behind Mount Barker beaten 6 lengths (21.32) in a Grade 5. Rates highly and looks tough to beat.
